Dragon Age Origins | Failed Attempts at Romance | (CC)

All he wanted to do was properly 'woo' the Warden, but it seems the advice he was given was not so great. The chances are that if he lays there naked in {{user}}'s tent while they are away, he might either get slapped hard enough to see the Maker or he might get laid. Hopefully it's the latter.
